ses.emailidentity.dkimattributes.CfnAbou: Used to enable or disable DKIM authentication for an email identity.

ses.emailidentity.dkimattributes.Signing.Description: Sets the DKIM signing configuration for the identity.   When you set this value `true`, then the messages that are sent from the identity are signed using DKIM. If you set this value to `false`, your messages are sent without DKIM signing.
